title: LightAura
description: A mod that makes the player holding any light source, such as a torch , glowstone, etc, automatically illuminate the surrounding area.
body:
[![Lightarue Hosting Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1210744/description_45293afd-81c5-4e69-aff0-25c907050440.png)](https://dathost.net/r/osama/minecraft-server-hosting)




### 🌟 **LightAura - Dynamic Lighting Anywhere!** 🌟

**Tired of the darkness while exploring caves? Struggling to see at night?** 🔦 **LightAura** is here to help!

✨ **What does this mod do?**

*   **Automatic Lighting** 💡: When holding light sources like **Torches, Lanterns, Glowstone, Sea Lanterns, or Soul Lanterns**, LightAura will automatically illuminate the area around you—no need to place blocks manually!
*   **Dropped Items Glow** 🏮: Even if you **drop a light source**, such as a torch or lantern, it will still illuminate the surroundings!
*   **Enhanced Visibility** 🔍: Say goodbye to dark caves 🏔️ and nighttime blindness 🌙—LightAura ensures you can always see your surroundings.
*   **Supports Various Light Sources**: Works with **Torches, Sea Lanterns, Soul Lanterns, Glowstone, and more!**

🚀 **Why download LightAura?**  
✔️ **Explore caves effortlessly** without wasting torches.  
✔️ **Adds immersive and realistic lighting** for a better gameplay experience.  
✔️ **Enhances vanilla gameplay** without feeling overpowered!

📥 **Download now and enjoy a brighter Minecraft adventure!**

 

***

📞 **Support & Collaboration:**

Join us to contribute, collaborate, and get salary!
